title: check_fzf_version panics if fzf changes its version output format
body: FinderChoice::check_fzf_version splits the 'fzf --version' output on '.' and indexes into exactly 3 parts. A recent fzf build that appends a git commit suffix to the version string (e.g. '0.46.0 (abcd123)') breaks this parsing and the unwrap-style parse().ok()? just silently returns None instead of a helpful warning.

title: --fzf-overrides-var interacts confusingly with --fzf-overrides
body: Passing both --fzf-overrides and --fzf-overrides-var doesn't error, but it's unclear from ClapConfig's help text which one wins when they'd set the same underlying fzf flag (e.g. --no-select-1 in one and --nth in the other).

title: convert_tldr mishandles examples with nested backticks
body: convert_tldr in src/clients/tldr.rs strips the leading/trailing backtick from example lines with line[1..line.len()-1], but a tldr page example containing an inline code span within the example command text produces a mangled cheatsheet entry.

title: Document precedence of NAVI_CONFIG_YAML vs NAVI_CONFIG file
body: The help text in src/config/cli.rs lists both NAVI_CONFIG (path to config file) and NAVI_CONFIG_YAML (config file content) as environment variables, but doesn't say what happens if both are set at once.

title: navi repo add doesn't validate the git URL before cloning
body: Running 'navi repo add' with a typo'd or unreachable URL just lets git fail with its own generic error partway through cloning, instead of navi checking the URL shape up front in src/commands/repo/add.rs and giving a navi-specific error message.
